original:
客户(00:15:58): We can see.

哲学家(00:15:59): Hello, may I judge this?You know you can do this for 1h, You know it's going to have the result.You're going to leave here.Say I didn't understand anything.I got nothing.We didn't do anything.And it will be true except one thing you will have gone through your chaos.
translation:
客户(00:15:58): 我们明白了。

哲学家(00:15:59): 你好，我可以对此做出判断吗？你知道你可以这样做一小时，你知道这将会产生结果。你将会离开这里。说“我什么都没理解。我一无所获。我们什么都没做。”这将是真实的，除了一件事——你将经历你的混沌。
